top_signals.title: Builder Shares Rise Despite Trump’s Threat to Kill Housing Bill
top_signals.summary: Katie Hubbard, president of US capital markets for Walton Global, said that the higher end of the housing market is still doing well as high income clients are still paying to buy and build homes. Hubbard said that despite efforts to make home buying more affordable for the wide public, it is hard for federal efforts to increase housing supply to make an impact. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Crypto Deal Between Cantor SPAC and Adam Back DAT Gets Delayed
top_signals.summary: A closely watched vote on a tie-up between a Cantor Fitzgerald-linked company and a digital-asset treasury firm led by Adam Back has been delayed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Qualcomm to design China-specific data center chip to comply with US export controls
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SecondFi loses $2.4 million in Cardano wallet exploit
